name: Customer Success & QBR Deck
description: Quarterly or annual review with an existing customer. Goal is to demonstrate value delivered, surface risks, and tee up renewal or expansion.
audience: Champion + executive sponsor; sometimes the original Economic Buyer
tone: Outcome-focused, candid. Acknowledge what didn't work alongside what did.

slides.content_guidance: Health score + headline outcomes + headline asks
3–5 outcomes with numbers (stat callout grid format)
Scorecard across adoption / value / advocacy / risk. Show underlying metric, not just traffic lights
3–5 specific wins with named teams or users
Honest list of missed targets, with diagnosis. This slide builds trust — don't skip it
Logins / active users / module adoption / data quality — with trend lines (charts grid)
If renewal in <6 months: terms, timing, value justification. Only include if renewal is imminent
Joint actions with owners and dates

special_notes.health_score_slide: Use a clear visual scorecard on Slide 5. Avoid traffic-light only; show the underlying metric (e.g., '87% adoption' not just green)
special_notes.what_didnt_land_slide: Slide 7 is critical for trust-building. Be honest about missed targets. Decks that skip this read as pure marketing.
special_notes.renewal_conversation_slide: Only include Slide 11 if renewal is within 6 months. Otherwise hold for next QBR.
